entities.name: Sliding Knowledge Threshold
entities.context: V's framework about minimum viable knowledge for any capability continuously decreasing due to AI compression

entities.name: Moore's Law
entities.context: Referenced as analogy for the rate at which knowledge thresholds are sliding downward

entities.name: AI compression
entities.context: The mechanism V identifies as continuously reducing how much humans need to know to take action

entities.name: irreducible human understanding
entities.context: Theoretical floor - the minimum understanding humans will always need regardless of AI advancement

relationships.context: Moore's Law used as analogy for the continuous downward slide of knowledge thresholds
AI compression is the causal mechanism driving knowledge thresholds downward
Irreducible human understanding represents the theoretical floor for the sliding threshold
